summary_en: See whether a candidate is truly directing AI work, instead of using AI as outsourced typing labor.
summary_zh: 看候选人是否真正在指挥 AI 干活，而不是把 AI 当成外包体力。

summary_en: See whether a candidate has AI product judgment, MVP discipline, spec writing ability, and cross-functional execution.
summary_zh: 看候选人是否有 AI 产品判断、MVP 边界感、spec 能力和跨职能推进能力。

summary_en: See whether a candidate can build a real growth system, from user signals to channel strategy, experiments, retention, and ROI.
summary_zh: 看候选人是否具备完整增长系统能力，能把用户信号转成渠道策略、实验、留存和 ROI。
